initiatives.name: Fort Collins Against Capitalism
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in Fort Collins. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective liberation and resistance.

initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs FoCo
initiatives.description: Free soup on Arapaho, Ute, and Cheyenne territory. Mutual aid.

initiatives.name: Clothe the People
initiatives.description: Our mission is radically simple: to distribute clothing, food, hygiene goods, and harm reduction supplies to those in need

initiatives.name: /r/FortCollinsMutualAid
initiatives.description: Cooperating to serve community members. A network of care and generosity to meet the immediate needs of neighbors. Share food, resources, skills, effort, and time!
